member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType
member.summary: Pattern modification type.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.PinData
member.summary: Pin data type.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.Ctv
member.summary: CTV (Capture This Vector) type.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.Mtv
member.summary: MTV (Mask This Vector) type.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.Lrpt
member.summary: LRPT (Local Repeat) type

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.Instruction
member.summary: Instruction type.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.Fuse
member.summary: Fuse type.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.Mix
member.summary: Mixed type.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.Common.PatternModificationType.Undefined
member.summary: Undefined.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.Configuration.Elements.CtvConfigurationElement
member.summary: CtvConfigurationElement class.

members.member:
this funcction convert fusedef adress to the patmod interleave adress. LABEL_START_VECTOR_INDEX_ADD_0+MOD(PAT_MOD_LIVE_ADDRESS,BLOCK_SIZE)*RATIO+INT(PAT_MOD_LIVE_ADDRESS/BLOCK_SIZE)*GAP + INT(PAT_MOD_LIVE_ADDRESS/BLOCK_SIZE)*(BLOCK_SIZE*RATIO).
example : for labelStartAddress-1000 , fusedefAdress- 30, ratio-1, DataBlockSize-3, GapSize-5 the "real" address in the paaten will be = 1000+(30%3)*1+(30/3)*5+(30/3)*(3*1)=1080 labelStartAddress. fusedefAdress. ratio. advanceOptions. the new address.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IConfigurationHandle
member.summary: Handle for a pattern configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IConfigurationHandle.GetDefinitionElements
member.summary: Get all definition elements in this object.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData
member.summary: IElementData.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.SetData(System.String)
member.summary: Set the modify data for the PatConfigHandle.
member.param: modify data input.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.SetData(System.String,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Set the modify data for the PatConfigHandle.
member.param: modify data input.
the index of required sub config.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.SetData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set the modify data for the PatConfigHandle.
member.param: modify data input.
the name of required sub config.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.FillData(Prime.PatConfigService.PatternSymbol)
member.summary: Repeat the pattern symbol character for the range of pattern vectors which is targeted to pattern modify.
member.param: pattern symbol.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.FillData(Prime.PatConfigService.PatternSymbol,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Repeat the pattern symbol character for the range of pattern vectors which is targeted to pattern modify.
member.param: pattern symbol.
the index of required sub config.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.FillData(Prime.PatConfigService.PatternSymbol,System.String)
member.summary: Repeat the pattern symbol character for the range of pattern vectors which is targeted to pattern modify.
member.param: pattern symbol.
the name of required sub config.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.ResetToDefault
member.summary: Reset the modify data that are stored to the default data. If no default data being specified in json, it will clear the modify data only.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.ResetToDefault(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Reset the modify data that are stored to the default data. If no default data being specified in json, it will clear the modify data only.
member.param: the index of required sub config.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.ResetToDefault(System.String)
member.summary: Reset the modify data that are stored to the default data. If no default data being specified in json, it will clear the modify data only.
member.param: the name of required sub config.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.IsSymbolDefined
member.summary: Check if modify data is a symbol to "fill".
member.returns: true if modify data is a symbol.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.IsDataSet
member.summary: Check if user set data or we have default data.
member.returns: true if user set data or we have default data, else false.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementData.GetRawData
member.summary: Gets the modify data of this configuration element.

member.summary: IElementDebug.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDebug.DebugString
member.summary: Get a debug string builder.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition
member.summary: IElementDefinition.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetName
member.summary: Get configuration name of this element.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetModificationType
member.summary: Get the element type.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.IsFoundPatternsToModify
member.summary: Indicates if patterns to modify were found in this handle based on inputs.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.CompareTo(Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition)
member.summary: Compare two element definition objects. Returns true if both elements modify the same location.
member.param: Other element definition object.
member.returns: True is both objects modify the same pattern modify location.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetElementDefinitionDump
member.summary: Get the element definition as string bulider.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetNumberOfConfigurationElements
member.summary: Returns number of configuration elements config in the handle.
member.returns: The number of configuration elements in the handle.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetExpectedDataSize
member.summary: Returns Expected data size for current Handle (when setting data).
member.returns: The Expected size of the data.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetExpectedDataSize(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Returns Expected data size for a specific sub config in the Handle.
member.param: the index of required sub config.
member.returns: The Expected size of the data for specific sub config. will throw exception if the index is out of range.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetExpectedDataSize(System.String)
member.summary: Returns Expected data size for a specific sub config in the Handle.
member.param: The element name whos expected data is requeted.
member.returns: The expected size of the data for specific sub config. will throw exception if the index is out of range.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetPatternsName
member.summary: Get All loadedPatterns names that the modify will be applied.
member.returns: a set of all pattern names.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IElementDefinition.GetConfigurationName
member.summary: Gets the patternName of the configuration the handle contains.
member.returns: the patternName of its configuration patternName.

member.summary: IStorable interface.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Handle.Interfaces.IStorable.IsStorable
member.summary: Returns an indication if this object is flagged for storing.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions
member.summary: class to set advance options to GetHandle.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions.InPkgApplyToPkgOnly
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether in PKG IP set if the modify will be applied to all IP or to PKG only.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions.ToBeStored
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether in the configuration is going to be stored.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions.Ratio
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether in the configuration is going to be stored.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether in the configuration is going to be stored.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions.GapSize
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether in the configuration is going to be stored.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions.ToString
member.summary: Convert this object to string for cache entry.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigService
member.summary: Handles all Pattern and Fuse Config activities.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigService.ApplyWithCache(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Apply the modify data based on the list of PatConfigHandles to the loadedPatterns.
member.param: list of PatConfigHandles.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigService.ApplyWithCache(Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Apply the modify data based on the PatConfigHandle to the loadedPatterns.
member.param: PatConfigHandle.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigService.IsServiceActive
member.summary: Indicates if service is active. Needed only for the GatewayService - to be removed when EVG is not around anymore.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigService.DoesConfigurationExist(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Determines if a configuration exists in the shared storage. This can be used during aleph-init stages to give early errors.
member.param: Configuration patternName.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigService.GetPatConfigDefinitionHandleWithPlist(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration patternName. It will contain PatConfig metadata and the pattern names that contains inside the plist that match the regex. It also set the modify data with user input.
member.param: configuration patternName.
plist patternName.
Regular Expression to reduce loadedPatterns in handler that not match it.
Advance options.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigSetPointHandle
member.summary: Handle for a PatConfig SetPoints.

member.summary: Apply the requested SetPoint.
member.param: Name of the set point to apply.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.Internal.IPatConfigSetPointHandle.ApplySetPointDefaultWithCache(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Apply default SetPoint as defined in the configuration file.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle
member.summary: Handle for a pattern configuration.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.SetPointHandleCheckerSymbol
member.summary: Symbol for set point handle checker.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.SetPointHandleCheckerSymbol.ModuleDoesNotExist
member.summary: Module doesn't exist.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.SetPointHandleCheckerSymbol.GroupDoesNotExist
member.summary: Group doesn't exist.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.SetPointHandleCheckerSymbol.SetPointDoesNotExist
member.summary: Set point doesn't exist.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.SetPointHandleCheckerSymbol.Exist
member.summary: all exist.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.EngineeringMode
member.summary: Symbol to select engineering mode operation.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.EngineeringMode.Production
member.summary: Normal Production Mode, no additional functionality

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.EngineeringMode.EngineeringSafe
member.summary: Engineering Mode to add new configurations but no overrides from different files.

member.name: F:Prime.PatConfigService.EngineeringMode.EngineeringUnsafe
member.summary: Engineering Mode to add new configurations and any override is allowed.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService
member.summary: Handles all Pattern and Fuse Config activities.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.ProcessPendingApplies(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Processes all pending . This method is responsible for waiting the queued operations that modify pattern. The method ensures these tasks are processed in the context of the provided session. Any user code performing a pattern read must explicitly call this method to ensure that the pattern data is up-to-date.
member.param: The session context provider container which encapsulates the session-specific information required for processing the tasks. This context is essential for ensuring that the tasks are executed in the correct session scope, maintaining the integrity and isolation of session data.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.CreateHandle(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PatConfigService.PatternModifyConfiguration},System.String,System.String,System.UInt16,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a handle on the fly without the need of a previous Aleph configuration.
member.param: The list of configurations for this handle.
The plist to filter the patterns to modify.
The regular expression to filter the list of patterns.
The ratio of the data. Default=[1].
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: An on-the-fly IPatConfigHandle based on the list of configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.GetPatConfigHandle(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration Name It will contain PatConfig metadata and the modify data.
member.param: configuration name.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.GetPatConfigHandle(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration name. It will contain PatConfig metadata and set the modify data with user input.
member.param: configuration name.
Regular Expression to reduce patterns in handler that not match it.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.GetPatConfigHandle(System.String,Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration name It will contain PatConfig metadata and the modify data.
member.param: configuration name.
Advance options.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration name. It will contain PatConfig metadata and set the modify data with user input.
member.param: configuration name.
Regular Expression to reduce patterns in handler that not match it.
Advance options.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.GetPatConfigHandleWithPlist(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration name. It will contain PatConfig metadata and the modify data and also the pattern names that contains inside the plist that match the regex.
member.param: configuration name.
plist name.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration name. It will contain PatConfig metadata and the pattern names that contains inside the plist that match the regex. It also set the modify data with user input.
member.param: configuration name.
plist name.
Regular Expression to reduce patterns in handler that not match it.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration name. It will contain PatConfig metadata and the modify data and also the pattern names that contains inside the plist that match the regex.
member.param: configuration name.
plist name.
Advance options.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.GetPatConfigHandleWithPlist(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns the specific PatConfigHandle that matched the configuration name. It will contain PatConfig metadata and the pattern names that contains inside the plist that match the regex. It also set the modify data with user input.
member.param: configuration name.
plist name.
Regular Expression to reduce patterns in handler that not match it.
Advance options.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Gets the list of all stored configuration names in the shared storage.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Gets list of all handles masked as storable.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.Apply(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Apply the modify data based on the list of PatConfigHandles to the patterns.
member.param: list of PatConfigHandles.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigService.Apply(Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Apply the modify data based on the PatConfigHandle to the patterns.

The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Reapply the stored data to the list of PatConfigHandles.
member.param: List of PatConfigHandle.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Get Handle for Set Point.
member.param: name of the module to get set point.
name of the group to get handle for.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Get Handle for Set Point with plist.
member.param: name of the module to get set point.
name of the group to get handle for.
plist name to apply the set point on.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Get Handle for Set Point.
member.param: name of the module to get set point.
name of the group to get handle for.
RegEx to reduce handle pattern size.
The session context of this operation.

name of the group to get handle for.
plist name to apply the set point on.
RegEx to reduce handle pattern size.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: To check is set point collateral availability.
member.param: module name.
group name.
set point name.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: return checker symbol that indicate all exist or missing certain collateral.

member.summary: To check is set point collateral availability.
member.param: Engineering Mode given by enum.
Engineering files to load configurations from.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Disables the service's internal cache.

member.summary: Enables the service's internal cache.

member.name: T:Prime.PatConfigService.PatternModifyConfiguration
member.summary: Defines a configuration for a pattern modify.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.PatternModifyConfiguration.StartAddress
member.summary: Gets or sets the start address, which can be a label or a number. If it's empty, the pattern modify will happen using the StartAddressOffset as the absolute address.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.PatternModifyConfiguration.StartAddressOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset from the start address.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.PatternModifyConfiguration.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of target pins.

member.name: P:Prime.PatConfigService.PatternModifyConfiguration.ExpectedDataSize
member.summary: Gets or sets expected the size of data for the pattern modify.
